content.thinking:
The user said "one-shot task". This is a common term in certain contexts - it could mean:

1. A single, self-contained task they want done in one shot
2. A reference to a type of agent or task configuration

Given this is a codebuddy project (cc-haha), let me check if there are any project files or configs that reference "one-shot" or "one_shot" or similar patterns, and also check the AGENTS.md file since there's an agents system here.
